biography: Matti, a name familiar to those who have followed the Hector Trophée over the years, is known for his calm demeanor on the course and his strategic approach to the game. While details about his home club remain a topic of hushed speculation, Matti's presence has always been marked by a quiet intensity.

With two past appearances in the Hector Trophée, Matti has demonstrated a commitment to the tournament's unique challenges. Although he has yet to secure a victory in the pairs competition or claim the Victor Trophy for individual performance, his participation has always been noted for his thoughtful play.

Considered to be retired from Hector Trophée events, Matti will not be participating in the upcoming Hector Trophée 2026. Nevertheless, golf enthusiasts will remember Matti for his approach to the sport.
